sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: India's fiscal deficit for April-July at Rs 4.68 lakh crore, widens to 29.9% of FY26 aim
feed.summary: India's fiscal deficit for April-July reached Rs 4.68 lakh crore, representing 29.9% of the annual estimate, widening from 17.2% in the previous year. Total receipts amounted to Rs 10.95 lakh crore, while overall expenditure stood at Rs 15.63 lakh crore.

feed.title: Hong Kong reduces Silver Bond coupon ahead of expected rate cut
feed.summary: The Hong Kong government is lowering the guaranteed coupon rate for its 10th batch of Silver Bonds offered to the city's senior citizens, as anticipation builds that the US Federal Reserve will commence its next cycle of interest rate cuts on September 18.
